meta.description: Planning guardrails for NEON COMMAND COA generation

rules.name: Overcommit guardrail
rules.description: Avoid committing more than 75% of available force unless threat is existential or operator explicitly overrides

rules.name: QRA preservation
rules.description: Maintain QRA alert pair at Spear Point unless all other options exhausted

rules.name: Reserve balance
rules.description: Prefer plans that distribute commitment across multiple bases rather than depleting one

rules.name: Next-wave awareness
rules.description: Planner should reason about likely follow-on pressure before committing reserve
